mapper.sql: CASE WHEN u.telegram_user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'telegram' WHEN h5id.identity_key IS NOT NULL AND h5id.identity_key != '' THEN 'platform' WHEN bind.client_uid IS NOT NULL THEN 'anonymous' ELSE 'platform' END

COALESCE( CASE WHEN u.telegram_user_id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('tg_', u.telegram_user_id) WHEN h5id.identity_key IS NOT NULL AND h5id.identity_key != '' THEN h5id.identity_key ELSE NULL END, bind.client_uid, CONCAT('user_', u.id) )
CASE WHEN ext.status IS NULL OR ext.status = '' OR ext.status IN ('anonymous', 'telegram', 'platform') THEN 'normal' ELSE ext.status END
COALESCE(ext.need_edit, CASE WHEN p.display_name IS NULL OR p.display_name = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
CASE WHEN COALESCE(ext.vip_type, 0) > 0 AND ext.vip_expires_at IS NOT NULL AND ext.vip_expires_at > NOW() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FROM app_user u LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, MIN(client_uid) AS client_uid FROM app_h5_client_uid GROUP BY user_id ) bind ON bind.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN app_user_identity h5id ON h5id.user_id = u.id AND h5id.identity_type = 'h5_account' LEFT JOIN app_h5_profile p ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext ext ON ext.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_ai_provider aip ON aip.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS conversation_count, MAX(updated_at) AS last_conversation_at FROM app_conversation GROUP BY user_id ) conv ON conv.user_id = u.id

where.if: ( bind.client_uid LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR h5id.identity_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.first_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.last_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.display_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ext.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT u.id AS id, AS account, CASE WHEN h5id.identity_key IS NOT NULL AND h5id.identity_key != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS passwordLogin, COALESCE( NULLIF(ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(p.display_name, ''), NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(u.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(u.last_name, ''))), ''), NULLIF(u.username, ''), CONCAT('user#', u.id) ) AS nickname, AS identityType, AS status, COALESCE(ext.vip_type, 0) AS vipType, CASE WHEN COALESCE(ext.vip_type, 0) >= 2 THEN 'SVIP' WHEN COALESCE(ext.vip_type, 0) = 1 THEN 'VIP' ELSE '免费' END AS vipLabel, AS vipActive, DATE_FORMAT(ext.vip_expires_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS vipExpiresAt, COALESCE(ext.score, 0) AS score, COALESCE(ext.gold_coin, 0) AS goldCoin, COALESCE(p.st_display_name, '') AS stDisplayName, COALESCE(ext.daily_chat_quota, 0) AS dailyChatQuota, ext.chat_quota_override AS chatQuotaOverride, COALESCE(ext.daily_chat_used, 0) AS dailyChatUsed, COALESCE(ext.daily_byok_chat_used, 0) AS dailyByokChatUsed, COALESCE(aip.provider_mode, 'system') AS aiProviderMode, COALESCE(aip.provider_source, '') AS aiProviderSource, COALESCE(aip.model_name, '') AS aiModelName, COALESCE(aip.custom_url, '') AS aiCustomUrl, CASE WHEN aip.api_key_cipher IS NOT NULL AND aip.api_key_cipher != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS aiApiKeySaved, DATE_FORMAT(aip.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS aiProviderUpdatedAt, COALESCE(ext.daily_image_quota, 0) AS dailyImageQuota, ext.image_quota_override AS imageQuotaOverride, COALESCE(ext.daily_image_used, 0) AS dailyImageUsed, COALESCE(ext.character_create_allowed, 0) AS characterCreateAllowed, AS needEdit, COALESCE(conv.conversation_count, 0) AS conversationCount, DATE_FORMAT(conv.last_conversation_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS lastConversationAt, DATE_FORMAT(u.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createTime
ORDER BY u.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT u.id AS id, AS account, CASE WHEN h5id.identity_key IS NOT NULL AND h5id.identity_key != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS passwordLogin, COALESCE( NULLIF(ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(p.display_name, ''), NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(u.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(u.last_name, ''))), ''), NULLIF(u.username, ''), CONCAT('user#', u.id) ) AS nickname, COALESCE(ext.avatar, u.photo_url, '') AS avatar, COALESCE(ext.bio, '') AS bio, AS identityType, AS status, COALESCE(ext.vip_type, 0) AS vipType, CASE WHEN COALESCE(ext.vip_type, 0) >= 2 THEN 'SVIP' WHEN COALESCE(ext.vip_type, 0) = 1 THEN 'VIP' ELSE '免费' END AS vipLabel, AS vipActive, DATE_FORMAT(ext.vip_expires_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS vipExpiresAt, COALESCE(ext.score, 0) AS score, COALESCE(ext.gold_coin, 0) AS goldCoin, COALESCE(ext.daily_chat_quota, 0) AS dailyChatQuota, ext.chat_quota_override AS chatQuotaOverride, COALESCE(ext.daily_chat_used, 0) AS dailyChatUsed, COALESCE(ext.daily_byok_chat_used, 0) AS dailyByokChatUsed, COALESCE(aip.provider_mode, 'system') AS aiProviderMode, COALESCE(aip.provider_source, '') AS aiProviderSource, COALESCE(aip.model_name, '') AS aiModelName, COALESCE(aip.custom_url, '') AS aiCustomUrl, CASE WHEN aip.api_key_cipher IS NOT NULL AND aip.api_key_cipher != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS aiApiKeySaved, DATE_FORMAT(aip.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS aiProviderUpdatedAt, COALESCE(ext.daily_image_quota, 0) AS dailyImageQuota, ext.image_quota_override AS imageQuotaOverride, COALESCE(ext.daily_image_used, 0) AS dailyImageUsed, COALESCE(ext.character_create_allowed, 0) AS characterCreateAllowed, AS needEdit, COALESCE(ext.gender, 0) AS gender, COALESCE(ext.birthday, '') AS birthday, COALESCE(ext.height, '') AS height, COALESCE(ext.weight, '') AS weight, COALESCE(ext.country, '') AS country, COALESCE(ext.characters, '') AS characters, COALESCE(ext.relation, '') AS relation, COALESCE(ext.occupation, '') AS occupation, COALESCE(ext.label, '') AS label, COALESCE(p.st_display_name, '') AS stDisplayName, COALESCE(p.persona, '') AS persona, COALESCE(conv.conversation_count, 0) AS conversationCount, DATE_FORMAT(conv.last_conversation_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS lastConversationAt, DATE_FORMAT(u.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createTime
WHERE u.id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT c.id AS conversationId, c.character_id AS characterId, COALESCE(NULLIF(c.title, ''), NULLIF(ch.name, ''), CONCAT('conversation#', c.id)) AS title, COALESCE(ch.name, '') AS characterName, DATE_FORMAT(c.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt, COALESCE(bind.status, '') AS bindingStatus, COALESCE(bind.st_runtime_profile, '') AS stRuntimeProfile, COALESCE(bind.st_chat_ref, '') AS stChatRef, COALESCE(bind.st_avatar_url, '') AS stAvatarUrl, COALESCE(bind.st_chat_file_name, '') AS stChatFileName, COALESCE(bind.st_display_name_override, '') AS stDisplayNameOverride, COALESCE(p.st_display_name, '') AS defaultStDisplayName, COALESCE(bind.st_world_names_json, '[]') AS stWorldNamesJson, COALESCE( NULLIF(bind.st_display_name_override, ''), NULLIF(p.st_display_name, ''), NULLIF(p.display_name, ''), NULLIF(ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(u.username, ''), CONCAT('user#', u.id) ) AS effectiveStDisplayName FROM app_conversation c JOIN app_user u ON u.id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN app_character ch ON ch.id = c.character_id LEFT JOIN app_conversation_st_binding bind ON bind.conversation_id = c.id LEFT JOIN app_h5_profile p ON p.user_id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext ext ON ext.user_id = c.user_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC, c.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
